statement: In every magma, Equation 604 (`x = y * (z * (w * (w * y)))`) implies Equation 1810 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * x) * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0341
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op w y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w x) u))
